TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Exeter materials state the implant and instrument system is designed to accommodate revision cases.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official Exeter materials describe a wide offset and body-size range used across primary, revision, and fracture workflows.
Revision use continues to rely on compatible femoral head options within the Exeter V40 platform.

row.system_notes: Cemented revision hip platform built around the Exeter femoral stem family for revision and complex femoral reconstruction cases.
